name: Chicken Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the crepes in a bowl.
2. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto an oiled hot skillet or crepe pan.
3. Do not overcrowd the pan as the mixture spreads widely.
4. After 1 minute, turn the crepes and cook the other side until golden brown.
5. Stack the cooked crepes when ready to assemble.
Filling Instructions:
1. Melt butter in a medium saucepan.
2. Add flour and stir for 1 minute.
3. Gradually add broth, milk, and wine, blending until smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining filling ingredients.
5. Stir the filling into the sauce.
6. Assemble crepes by placing about 1/3 cup of filling in the center of each crepe.
7. Roll the crepes tightly and secure with the ends.
8. Serve hot. Makes 4 filled crepes, each providing 9 grams of protein.
